# FFBPL MATCH

> Premium esports tournament platform for Free Fire, PUBG, COD, and Valorant. Join real-money tournaments, track your rank, and cash out winnings via bKash and Nagad.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of FFBPL MATCH and featured tournaments.
- [Tournaments](/tournaments): Browse live and upcoming esports tournaments.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account or log in to compete.

## Optional

- [Player Dashboard](/dashboard): Authenticated player overview (private).
- [User Profile](/profile): Authenticated profile management (private).
- [Wallet](/wallet): Authenticated wallet, deposits, withdrawals (private).
